channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pulp Celebrate Rough Trade's 50th Anniversary with Orchestral Performance of New Album 'More'
item.description: Pulp delivered a special orchestral performance of their latest album ‘More’ during the 50th anniversary celebrations of their iconic label Rough Trade at London’s Royal Festival Hall. The Sheffield i...

item.title: Trump's Expanded Comments on the Iran War Draw Sharp Criticism from Political Commentators
item.description: President Donald Trump faced renewed criticism after making remarks about the ongoing conflict with Iran while speaking to reporters at Joint Base Andrews following his return from the FIFA World Cup ...

item.title: Technical access issue prevents reading the Mornington Peninsula weather article
item.description: The article encountered a technical barrier preventing access to the Mornington Peninsula weather content. News Corp Australia employs software to manage crawler bot traffic, which may block non-autom...

item.title: Netflix and YouTube Intensify Competition for Content Creators
item.description: The article discusses the escalating competition between Netflix and YouTube as both platforms vie for dominance in the creator economy. With rising costs for content production and increasing demands...

item.title: Spain Secures Second World Cup Title with Extra-Time Victory Over 10-Man Argentina
item.description: In a dramatic conclusion to the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Spain triumphed over 10-man Argentina in a scoreless match that lasted 115 minutes of action before Ferran Torres broke the deadlock in extra time....

item.title: Saskatchewan Roughriders' Jayden Dalke Dies in Car Crash
item.description: The Saskatchewan Roughriders are grieving the loss of linebacker and team captain Jayden Dalke, who died in a car crash on Saturday evening. The team announced his death Sunday, describing him as 'the...

item.title: Delhi Government Mobilizes Self-Help Groups to Create Two Lakh National Flags for Independence Day Campaign
item.description: The Delhi government is launching the Har Ghar Tiranga 2026 campaign ahead of Independence Day to foster public participation, patriotism, and national unity. Under this initiative, Self-Help Groups (...

item.title: News Corp Australia Blocks Crawler Bots with Access Issues Message
item.description: News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. If users are blocked and not bots, they're advised to disable ad blockers, enable JavaScript, update browser...

item.title: Barangay Secretary Killed by Riding-in-Tandem in Angono
item.description: A barangay secretary in Angono, Rizal, was fatally shot by a riding-in-tandem motorcycle rider early Tuesday morning. The incident occurred as the victim was about to start his work duties. According ...

item.title: SDP candidate advocates state policing reforms and federal-state power balance
item.description: The article discusses the Nigerian Senate's passage of the State Police Bill, which transfers security responsibilities from the federal government to states. SDP candidate Oluwatamilore Adekanye supp...

item.title: Greek fire: The Byzantine incendiary weapon that shaped naval warfare
item.description: Greek fire, a mysterious incendiary weapon used by the Byzantine Empire from the 7th century, was a game-changer in naval battles. This combustible liquid, sprayed through bronze tubes on warships, ad...

item.title: Military heightens security in BARMM areas amid grenade attacks and election concerns
item.description: The Philippine military has placed troops in Maguindanao del Norte and Maguindanao del Sur on heightened alert following two grenade attacks that wounded two soldiers and three civilians. The Commissi...

item.title: Minister's legal battle intensifies as court proceedings continue
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing legal challenges faced by a senior minister who is currently under investigation for alleged misconduct. The court case has sparked widespread public debate, with sup...

item.title: Spain secures second FIFA World Cup triumph with Ferran Torres' decisive goal against Argentina
item.description: Spain emerged victorious in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, defeating Argentina 1-0 in a tightly contested match. Ferran Torres scored the winning goal in the 106th minute, marking Spain's second World...

item.title: Spain clinch FIFA World Cup 2026 with extra-time victory over 10-man Argentina
item.description: Spain secured their second FIFA World Cup title by defeating 10-man Argentina 1-0 in extra time at the New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026. The decisive goal came from substitute Ferran Torre...

item.title: Nigeria Condemns Xenophobic Attacks In South Africa, Calls For Regional Unity
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has strongly condemned xenophobic attacks in South Africa, urging African leaders to unite against the intolerance. He highlighted Nigeria's evacuation of over 1490 citizens from...

item.title: Tips for Preventing Mold and Mildew in Summer
item.description: The article provides practical advice on preventing and protecting against mold and mildew, particularly during Canada's humid summers. It emphasizes that mold thrives in damp environments and highlig...

item.title: Athlete's fear of safety prompts anti-doping test amid surprise home inspection
item.description: An athlete has undergone an anti-doping test following concerns about her personal safety when doping control officers unexpectedly visited her home. The incident highlights the tension between anti-d...

item.title: Philippine Exorcist School Combines Faith and Therapy

item.title: Cast of 'Blood vs Duty' explores family versus duty dilemma
